body.title: Ticket filenames lead with status for ls-by-status (post-cutover)
body.description:
**Akien's ask (2026-06-19):** ticket filenames should lead with status (status--title--createdatetime) so the active queue is filterable by a plain `ls`/directory search, and the original creation date is visible without extended file properties.

**Current:** `cc.0.T-<slug>.<YYYYMMDD.HHMMSSffffff>.json` — already carries the created datestamp AND the title-slug; only the leading status is missing.

**Proposed shape:** `<status>.cc.0.T-<slug>.<created-stamp>.json` (status FIRST). Keep the `T-<slug>` so `_find` keeps globbing by id fast (dropping it for free text forces a scan+parse of every file on the 2000+ store).

**Consequences to handle:**
- Status-in-name = rename on EVERY status transition (today only the terminal ->closed/ move renames). ticket_store already does atomic os.replace for the closed move; extend that single mover (_put) to rename within tickets/ when the status component changes. Atomic-rename + flock invariants must hold.
- Does NOT replace the closed/ bin: the subdir keeps the active dir holding only in-flight work (hard requirement); the status prefix makes `ls` within each dir filterable. Keep both.
- One-time migration: rename ~2088 existing files to the new scheme.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/ticket_store.py (_envelope filename, _put rename-on-status-change, _find/_iter_files glob), a one-shot migration script.
**Design rules:** filesystem-first build queue (D-build-queue-filesystem-first); atomic write+rename (PATTERN-004); closed/ bin keeps active dir clean.
**Scope boundary:** filename scheme + rename-on-transition + one-time migration; does NOT change the envelope body schema or the closed/ bin decision.
**Test plan:** ls-by-status returns the right set; rename-on-transition leaves a single copy with the new name; _find still resolves by id; migration is idempotent.

**Sequencing (CC recommendation, Akien approved 'when you think best'):** GATED on T-ticket-pg-drop — do the filename rename AFTER the authority flip lands, so we are not migrating 2088 filenames while also flipping the source of truth. One big change at a time, per the decision's no-big-bang rule.
**HIGH-inertia:** ticket_store.py chokepoint + bulk file migration. Approval pre-stamped (Akien, 2026-06-19, this design conversation).
